title: acmella caulirhiza
intro: Acmella caulirhiza, also known as paracress or toothache plant, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate toothaches and other pain conditions. The health benefits of Acmella caulirhiza include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Acmella caulirhiza can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
